title: monardella villosa var. neglecta
intro: Monardella villosa var. neglecta, also known as Purple Sage or Desert Purple Sage, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its fragrant purple flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Monardella villosa var. neglecta has been traditionally used to promote respiratory health, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, salves, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for a variety of health benefits.
